'''tazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:onball|onball]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:onball|onball]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tazhate|tazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tazhatesher|tazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazhatesherĂ«m|tazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazhatero|tazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tazhateshĂ«|tazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazhateshĂ«m|tazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazhatero|gokitazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitazhateshĂ«|gokitazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazhateshĂ«m|gokitazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotazhankerom|gotazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotazhankeshĂ«|gotazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotazhankeshĂ«m|gotazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotazhankeya|gotazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazhaterom|tazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazhatemu|tazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tazhateya|tazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazhaterom|gokitazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazhatemu|gokitazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitazhateya|gokitazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tazhazhate|tazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tazhazhatesher|tazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazhazhatesherĂ«m|tazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazhazhatero|tazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tazhazhateshĂ«|tazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazhazhateshĂ«m|tazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazhazhatero|gokitazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitazhazhateshĂ«|gokitazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazhazhateshĂ«m|gokitazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotazhazhankerom|gotazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotazhazhankeshĂ«|gotazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotazhazhankeshĂ«m|gotazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotazhazhankeya|gotazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tazhazhaterom|tazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tazhazhatemu|tazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tazhazhateya|tazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitazhazhaterom|gokitazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitazhazhatemu|gokitazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitazhazhateya|gokitazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠte|tĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠtesher|tĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠtero|tĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokitĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠterom|tĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠtemu|tĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠzhĂŠteya|tĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokitĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokitĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafzhafte|tafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafzhaftesher|tafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafzhaftesherĂ«m|tafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafzhaftero|tafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafzhafteshĂ«|tafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafzhafteshĂ«m|tafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafzhaftero|gokitafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafzhafteshĂ«|gokitafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafzhafteshĂ«m|gokitafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafzhafnkerom|gotafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafzhafnkeshĂ«|gotafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gotafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafzhafnkeya|gotafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafzhafterom|tafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafzhaftemu|tafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafzhafteya|tafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafzhafterom|gokitafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafzhaftemu|gokitafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafzhafteya|gokitafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
